[[af:Vuurslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Feuer-Schlange]][[hak:Tên-sṳ]][[ja:丁巳]][[ko:정사 (간지)]][[vi:Đinh Tỵ]][[za:Dingceih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-sū]][[zh-yue:丁巳]][[zh:丁巳]]

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 54th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Fire Dragon]] and followed by [[Yang Earth Horse]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Hinoto (丁)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], forming a harmonious relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)]]).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Snake (丁巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 si6
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: teiji
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongsa (정사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Tỵ

==Years of Yin Fire Snake==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 57 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Fire Snake]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Snake (丁巳)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 57|57 AD]]
* [[AD 117|117 AD]]
* [[177|177 AD]]
* [[237|237 AD]]
* [[297|297 AD]]
* [[357|357 AD]]
* [[417|417 AD]]
* [[477|477 AD]]
* [[537|537 AD]]
* [[597|597 AD]]
* [[657|657 AD]]
* [[717|717 AD]]
* [[AD 777|777 AD]]
* [[837|837 AD]]
* [[897|897 AD]]
* [[957|957 AD]]
|
* [[1017|1017 AD]]
* [[1077|1077 AD]]
* [[1137|1137 AD]]
* [[1197|1197 AD]]
* [[1257|1257 AD]]
* [[1317|1317 AD]]
* [[1377|1377 AD]]
* [[1437|1437 AD]]
* [[1497|1497 AD]]
* [[1557|1557 AD]]
* [[1617|1617 AD]]
* [[1677|1677 AD]]
* [[1737|1737 AD]]
* [[1797|1797 AD]]
* [[1857|1857 AD]]
* [[1917|1917 AD]]
* [[1977|1977 AD]]
|
* [[2037 AD]]
* [[2090s|2097 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2157 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2217 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2277 AD]]
* [[2337 AD]]
* [[2397 AD]]
* [[25th century|2457 AD]]
* [[2517 AD]]
* [[2577 AD]]
* [[2637 AD]]
* [[2697 AD]]
* [[2757 AD]]
* [[2817 AD]]
* [[2877 AD]]
* [[2937 AD]]
* [[2997 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yin Fire Snake==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoto (癸)]] or [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]]), the month of [[April]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Fire Snake]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Lixia]] until the day before [[Mangzhong]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Snake==
=== 選日 ===
The selected day for [[Yin Fire Snake]] is the 4th day of [[Hassen]] (excluding gap days).

==See Also==

{{wikidata link|Q905311}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
